{% extends "layouts/base.html" %} {% block title %}New Vendor - NexusERP{% endblock %} {% block content %}
Cancel

Create Supplier

{{ form.hidden_tag() }}
General Information
{{ form.name.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.name(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. SteelMasters Inc") }}
{{ form.contact_person.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.contact_person(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. Alice Brown") }}
{{ form.email.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.email(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. contact@steelmasters.com") }}
{{ form.phone.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.phone(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. +1 555-0201") }}
{{ form.gst_number.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.gst_number(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. 27AAAAA1111A1Z1") }}
Address & Procurement
{{ form.address.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.address(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", rows=2, placeholder="Factory/Office Address") }}
{{ form.city.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.city(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. Detroit") }}
{{ form.state.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.state(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. Michigan") }}
{{ form.pincode.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.pincode(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. 48201") }}
{{ form.payment_terms.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.payment_terms(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. Net 30") }}
{{ form.lead_time_days.label(class="form-label") }} {{ form.lead_time_days(class="form-control border-secondary bg-dark text-light", placeholder="e.g. 7") }}
{{ form.submit(class="btn btn-primary bg-gradient border-0 px-4 py-2") }} Cancel
{% endblock %}
